allow: PowerShell(foreach \($c in 'python','py','python3','npx'\) { $s=\(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if\($s\){"$c -> $s"} else {"$c -> NO"} })

PowerShell($sdk="$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"; Get-ChildItem $sdk -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders; "---build-tools---"; Get-ChildItem "$sdk\\build-tools" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders; "---platforms---"; Get-ChildItem "$sdk\\platforms" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders)

PowerShell($root="C:\\Users\\Diego Marchesini\\Desktop\\app scontrini"; $www="$root\\www"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $www | Out-Null; foreach\($i in 'index.html','sw.js','manifest.webmanifest','css','js','icons'\){ if\(Test-Path "$root\\$i"\){ Move-Item -Path "$root\\$i" -Destination "$www\\$i" -Force } }; "moved"; Get-ChildItem $www | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4321 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { "In ascolto su 4321 \(LocalAddress: $\($c.LocalAddress\)\)" } else { "Porta 4321 NON in ascolto" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.1.200:4321/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - raggiungibile via IPv4 \($\($r.RawContentLength\) byte\)" } catch { "NON raggiungibile via IPv4: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
